response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched the video and identified the performer as Oozora Subaru from on-screen text and visual recognition. 2. Identified the song title from the text overlay as 'ラブミ！' (Love Me!). 3. Searched for 'ラブミ！ 大空スバル lyrics' to get the original composer and full lyrics. 4. Found that the composer is Natsushiro Takaaki. 5. Confirmed the performance is a continuous song segment and created one scene for the entire video. 6. Populated the JSON with the title, artist, performer, language, and the lyrics found.
response.global_summary: A musical performance video of Oozora Subaru's original song 'ラブミ！' (Love Me!), featuring choreographed dancing.

scenes.description: A musical performance of the song 'ラブミ！' by Oozora Subaru. The video features her dancing and singing on a stage, with credits appearing on screen.
